title: Muddy Hands Pack of 2-47 Litre Under Bed Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids – Clear Wheeled Storage Containers for Bedroom, Home & Office – Stackable & Space Saving
features: Space-Saving Design – Maximise your storage with these 47 litre under bed plastic boxes. Perfect for organising seasonal clothing, bedding, toys, shoes, and more while keeping your space clutter-free.
Durable & Transparent – Crafted from strong, clear plastic for easy visibility of contents without opening. The robust material ensures long-term, reliable use.
Simple Lid Closure – Each box features a flat, non-locking lid that sits securely on top, helping to protect contents from dust and dirt while maintaining quick and easy access.
Smooth Glide Wheels – Built-in wheels allow for effortless sliding under the bed or around the home, even when fully loaded – ideal for frequent access.
Generous Size & Stackable – External Dimensions: Length: 90cm x Width: 38cm x Height: 18cm. The low-profile design fits neatly under most beds and can be stacked to optimise storage space.
description: Product Description Muddy Hands: Our Story With over 10 years of experience in the home and garden industry. Driven by passion and dedication, we design and source high-quality products to enhance your garden and home. From our roots in gardening to our growing home range, we aim to help you create a space that's uniquely yours. Secure Lid for Dust-Free Storage The fitted lid helps protect contents from dust, dirt and moisture , making it suitable for long-term storage. ✔ Keeps items fresh ✔ Helps reduce clutter ✔ Ideal for everyday or seasonal use Durable & Transparent Crafted from strong, clear plastic for easy visibility of contents without opening. The robust material ensures long-term, reliable use. Space-Saving Design Maximise your storage with these 47 litre under bed plastic boxes. Perfect for organising seasonal clothing, bedding, toys, shoes, and more while keeping your space clutter-free.
